configure.title: Set up TRMNL device
configure.description: Device showing code {code}. Choose the screen it should display.

abort.not_hassio: Byonk requires the Byonk add-on, which needs a Home Assistant Supervised or HAOS installation.
abort.already_configured: This device is already set up.
abort.no_hub: The Byonk hub is not set up yet. Set up the Byonk integration first.
abort.addon_error: Could not install or start the Byonk add-on automatically. Add the repository https://github.com/oetiker/byonk to the add-on store, install the Byonk add-on, then retry.
abort.addon_unhealthy: The Byonk add-on started, but its management API did not respond as expected. Make sure the Byonk add-on is up to date (a version that supports the admin API), then retry.
abort.add_failed: Could not add the device to Byonk.
